learned_patterns.pattern: Unit design documents are snapshots in time, not living documentation
learned_patterns.context: During cleanup unit review, user clarified that unit documents capture what was planned at that moment. They are historical artifacts, not to be held up against final implementation. The actual source of truth is design/README.md and the codebase.
examples: Architecture unit used Gin/MongoDB in docs, but final implementation uses Chi/PostgreSQL - this is expected
Core-infra unit recommended single Dockerfile, but implementation used separate dev/prod - valid trade-off
